metadata.source_note: Demo operating export grounded in publicly reported SpaceX facts (founded 2002, Hawthorne CA, launch services, Starlink, Falcon 9, Starship). Line items are illustrative internal finance records, not proprietary filings.

records.title: Runway floor
records.text: Maintain at least eighteen months of runway unless the board approves a Starship acceleration exception.

records.title: Vendor commitment notification
records.text: New vendor commitments at or above this annual value require board notification before signature.

records.title: Competitive renewal review
records.text: Contracts above this annual value need competitive review before renewal.

records.title: Renewal review window
records.text: Competitive review must begin this many days before renewal.

records.title: ITAR compliance priority
records.text: Export-controlled launch and satellite work must maintain ITAR evidence before revenue recognition on government contracts.

records.title: Headcount funding basis
records.text: New roles must map to signed launch manifest revenue, Starlink subscriber growth, or documented Starship milestone savings.

records.title: Falcon manifest approval
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX Falcon manifest changes before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Starlink capacity exception
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX Starlink capacity expansion before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Starship capex memo
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX Starship capital expenditure before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Launch range safety review
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX launch range safety review before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: NASA contract modification
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX NASA contract modifications before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Headcount exception memo
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX headcount exceptions before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Budget variance notice
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX budget variance before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Enterprise security review
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX enterprise security review before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Revenue forecast update
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX forecast changes before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: ITAR visitor access
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX ITAR-controlled facility access before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Material contract exception
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX material contract changes before committing spend or forecast changes.

records.title: Hiring exception memo
records.text: Management must retain evidence for SpaceX headcount exceptions before committing spend or forecast changes.
